rulings.Case Title: STANLEY G HILTON VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction And Permanent Injunction; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 25, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF STANLEY HILTON's Motion For Preliminary Injunction And Permanent Injunction. Grant Preliminary Injunction as to San Farnciso property only. Hearing required re bond. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STANLEY G HILTON VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 25, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to Causes of Action: 1) Quiet title - to allege tender on exepmtion from tender rule in good faith. 3) Fraud - to allege fraud against corporate entities with requisite particularity. 6) Contract(s) - to allege contract that was/were breached. Overruled as to Causes of Action 2) Wrongrul eviction and 5) Unfair competition. = (501/REQ)
